nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Emilie Snethlage
nodes.summary: Emilie Snethlage是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Snethlage's tody-tyrant、Sclater's antwren、Goeldi's antbird等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.summary: Sclater's antwren（Sclater's antwren，学名 Myrmotherula sclateri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sclater's antwren (Myrmotherula sclateri) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sclater's antwren is found in the upper Amazon Basin south of the Amazon River, in eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and western Brazil east to the Xingu River and south to Mato Grosso state
